title: 阪神JFの後に・輝かしき一歩

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With an astounding show of talent, Air Groove
wins the Hanshin Juvenile Fillies.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she states that it's merely a waypoint
on her journey to reach her ideal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove wishes to become a shining beacon
that all Umamusume aspire toward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to achieve that, she firmly announces
that she will be running in the Tiara tour: the Oka
Sho, the Japanese Oaks, and the Shuka Sho.
